name: Latch Approval Gate
description: Routes agent tool calls through Latch /approve before execution.

approveUrl.label: Latch Approve URL
approveUrl.help: HTTP endpoint for latch approval checks.

timeoutMs.label: Approval Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum wait time for each approval request.

failClosed.label: Fail Closed
failClosed.help: Block tool calls when latch is unreachable or returns invalid responses.
